scope_delivery.explanation: Yes. Declared scope was ~25 nodes / ~35 edges across the four specialized metaphysics clusters; delivered exactly 25 nodes and 36 edges. The +1 edge over the declared band came from including a third edge in the numerical_identity cross-references (numerical_identity → mereology, alongside counterpart_theory and haecceity) — caught by mechanical edge-count recount during authoring and updated consistently across the contract block, body comment, ROUTING narrative, and commit message before push. All other declared properties delivered exactly: 100% INTERPRETED confidence_level, PREDICATE_MANIFEST.md untouched, no cross-domain edges, sub-range slots 0037-0039 left reserved, two-commit pattern (deliverable 8dbd982 + close commit), graph_version 4→5 honored. No descoping, no reordering, no mid-session deferrals beyond the master-plan-named cross-domain edges to P5-11.

outcome_summary: Phase 5 metaphysics specialized seed (P5-02b) lands at S-0056. 25 nodes + 36 edges across four clusters per phase_5.md T1-B: modality (Lewis 1986 modal realism vs Plantinga/Stalnaker/Adams ersatzism + Fine 1994 essence + Adams haecceity + Lewis counterpart theory), free will (van Inwagen 1983 Consequence Argument + Frankfurt 1971 hierarchical compatibilism + Kane/O'Connor libertarianism + Strawson 1962 reactive attitudes + Frankfurt 1969 PAP), properties/universals (Armstrong 1989 realism + Rodriguez-Pereyra 2002 nominalism comparison + Williams 1953 tropes + bundle theory), mereology (van Inwagen 1990 SCQ + Lewis-Sider universalism + Dorr/Sider nihilism). graph_version 4→5; live totals 106 nodes, 138 edges in paideia-dev. Both P5-02b criteria PASS. Cold-review pass: 7/7 PASS — sub-agent verified 25 nodes / 36 edges / 1 settings UPDATE / single-tag domain[] / 100% INTERPRETED / graph_version=5 everywhere / transaction wrap / all source/target IDs resolve to in-migration or P5-02a nodes / forward-only edges (no back-edges) / no cycles / no DDL / no new predicates / granularity correct. validate.py: 30 checks, 0 hard-fails, 103 soft-warns (101 missing_rigor_score expected per T2-C partial-seed shape; 2 issue_collision = upstream MemPalace #1/#2). Two-commit pattern continued: deliverable commit 8dbd982 (0036_*.sql + ROUTING.md narrative) staged scope-check engaged with 4 checks 0 fails; status flip + close bundled in this close commit. Edge count drift caught pre-push: plan said 35, actual was 36 — recount during authoring updated contract+body+ROUTING+commit-message consistently. Metaphysics subdomain fully seeded (P5-02a + P5-02b complete). Backlog unchanged: 0 in-project actionable; #1, #2 upstream MemPalace remain. Forward state: P5-03 Logic next eligible in walk order; broad parallel-eligible tier (P5-03/P5-04a/P5-05/P5-06/P5-07a/P5-08/P5-09/P5-10) all have depends_on [P5-01a] satisfied. Phase 5: 4/16 tasks complete; 4/18 routine sessions consumed.
